title: Typography Section - Full controls with violation detection
controls_implemented: Font weight dropdown (100-900 with named weights)
Font size input with unit selector (px/rem/em/%)
Line height input with unit selector (unitless/px/rem/em/normal)
Letter spacing input with unit selector (em/px/rem)
Color picker with swatch and text input
violation_detection: Font size not matching design tokens
Color using raw hex instead of token
